reviews.review_description: I spent quite some time there with a friend. Besides the obvious immersive, club-like showy musical activities, you can swim on dolphin like in Avatar, shoot fireworks or drive a remote-controlled car. An incredible place to spend time with friends!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the awesome review! 🐬🎆🎶

reviews.review_description: Don't let the video fool you‼️ It's nothing like that‼️🧐 The YouTube part of the app does NOT work at all👎👎👎👈 I have put in one request, and it said I put in too many! 😂 it gave a message saying YouTube has reached its limit .😳😫 There's no way to control the music to turn it down or off. The only way to do it is to turn it down from your headset. They need to implement a setting to turn down the music. The controls are really bad! Nobody is playing this game.🤔 unless you want to party by yourself without any interruptions, then buy it. 👍Other than that, save your money because not everybody's going to pay the money to do nothing in here but listen to other music artists that is on the DEVS playlist 👎👎👎I got it on sale, which is not worth it at all. 😒A lot of things you can just walk right through it because it's non-static items. 😒The only thing you can play is the people that you see on the screen or what they put in the game itself.NOTHING more NOTHING less. I was so looking forward to using the YouTube part of the app, but that is doo doo. There's Nobody in the public lobby and on other servers to hang out with. It's nothing unless you know somebody who bought the game the same time you did or whatever the case may be. This app reminds me of another app just like this it's probably by the same creator, but they just gave it a  different name. Meaning just a better updated version of the first, hopefully, they will fix the YouTube part of the app. to me, it seems like it's been abandoned. I'm going to take a short video, and you guys be the judge yourself. It has potential, but at its state now, NO👎

reviews.review_title: Has potential but not there yet‼️
reviews.review_description: This game seems to be OK, but I don’t really know because the controls are really bad‼️ there’s no setting to turn down the music. The only way to turn it down or off is to turn it off by your headset. This game reminds me of another game just like this but a better version of it. The YouTube app doesn’t work at all. It says you have requested too many even though I have only requested one 😂😂😂😂 It even gives you the error message YouTube has reached its limit 😂😂😂😂 No matter what place you go Asia EU or US no matter what nobody’s there to join. I believe this app has been abandoned. Nobody’s playing it. I just brought it on sale. The only music you can play were here are the ones the devs have implemented in the game. It would’ve been nice to make it away where you can put your own songs or videos on the screen. Is the same music playing all the time. It gets a little annoying, especially when you can’t turn the music down as blurring in your ears.👂 I haven’t seen anyone playing on any of the servers as of yet. it gets a little boring hanging out by yourself.

developer_response.body:
We've improved the streaming system to make sure music experience is smoother than ever.
Audio control is important, and we want to clarify that the app uses spatial audio - the music gets much quieter as you move away from the speakers. We truly appreciate your patience and support as we continue improving the experience - this project is built with love for good music and the community!

Best,
The Tripica Team 🎶🔥✨

reviews.review_title: Best app for relax and enjoy music
reviews.review_description: The feeling of partying on a beach is absolutely amazing! The interactive fireworks blew me away and the hand tracking is spot-on… especially for me since I finally have all my fingers back! Playing with fireworks after a few drinks is not the best idea, but it's safe there! Overall, this is a must try for any music lover!
